---
ID: SLD-FE-210
Title: Template Library Thumbnail and Preview Picker
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As a slide creator
I want visual thumbnails and quick preview in template selection
So I can choose the right template without dead-end trial-and-error duplication

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Template cards display thumbnail preview with accessible fallback when image is missing.
- [ ] Template list supports consistent skeleton/loading state while previews hydrate.
- [ ] Users can open a quick preview modal/panel with larger render before duplication.
- [ ] Cards indicate stale/missing preview status and offer refresh action for owners/admins.
- [ ] Search and filter behavior remains consistent with thumbnails enabled.
